channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-18 to 2026-07-24
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 1 INTERESTING, 6 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 5.9 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 73°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.9 sec). Sun 2026-07-19: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 14:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 10 kt WNW, water 72°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 4 kt NNW, water 70°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNW). Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 4.2 sec, wind 7 kt SSE, water 70°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft); period too short (4.2 sec); wind direction off (SSE). Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.4 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 11 kt WSW, water 68°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.4 ft); period too short (5.8 sec). Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.9 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 8 kt NW, water 69°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.9 ft). Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 7.3 sec, wind 6 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); wind direction off (N).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 1 INTERESTING, 6 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 5.9 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 73°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.9 sec).
  • Sun 2026-07-19: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 14:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 10 kt WNW, water 72°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 4 kt NNW, water 70°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNW).
  • Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 4.2 sec, wind 7 kt SSE, water 70°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft); period too short (4.2 sec); wind direction off (SSE).
  • Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.4 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 11 kt WSW, water 68°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.4 ft); period too short (5.8 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.9 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 8 kt NW, water 69°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.9 ft).
  • Fri 2026-07-24: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 7.3 sec, wind 6 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); wind direction off (N).
